INTERNATIONAL PATIENTS
DESIGN GUIDELINE
SECTION 1 — HERO
Layout
Hero đơn giản.
Desktop:
● Text bên trái
● Hình ảnh bên phải
Mobile:
● Text trên
● Hình dưới
Khoảng trắng rộng.
Ưu tiên cảm giác: organized, reassuring, professional
Website Copy
International Patients
Planning dental treatment in Vietnam from another country often comes with many questions.
Understanding your options and the process involved before you travel can help you plan with greater confidence.
Primary CTA
Send Your X-ray
Secondary CTA
Discuss Your Situation
Primary Media
Không sử dụng:
● hình du lịch
● hình sân bay
● hình điểm tham quan
● hình quảng bá Việt Nam
Ưu tiên:
● Bệnh nhân quốc tế hoặc Việt kiều
● Đang trao đổi với bác sĩ
● Đang được tư vấn
● Đang xem X-ray hoặc CBCT
Supporting Media
Có thể thêm badge nhỏ:
● English Speaking Team
● Online Consultation Available
● International Patient Support
SECTION 2 — WHO IS THIS PAGE FOR?
Layout
5 audience cards
2 hàng
Desktop:
3 + 2
Mobile:
1 cột
Website Copy
✓ International Patients
✓ Overseas Vietnamese
✓ Expatriates Living in Vietnam
✓ Patients Exploring Dental Care Abroad
✓ Patients Planning Treatment During A Trip To Vietnam
Primary Media
Icon-based cards.
Ví dụ:
● globe
● airplane
● passport
● communication
● travel calendar
Card Style
Simple icon + label
Ví dụ:
● Overseas Vietnamese
● International Patients
● Expats
● Exploring Treatment Abroad
● Treatment During Vietnam Visit
SECTION 3 — BEFORE YOU TRAVEL
Layout
2-column layout.
Bên trái:
Text
Bên phải:
Preparation checklist
Website Copy
If you already have X-rays, CBCT scans, or dental records, these can be shared in advance for an initial review.
This may help you:
✓ Explore possible treatment options
✓ Discuss timing considerations
✓ Understand what to expect
✓ Plan your trip more effectively
Primary Media
Mockup:
● X-ray upload
● CBCT review
● WhatsApp conversation
● Email exchange
Supporting Media
Flow nhỏ:
Send Records → Review → Discussion
SECTION 4 — WHAT DOES THE PROCESS TYPICALLY LOOK LIKE?
Layout
Timeline.
Desktop:
timeline ngang
Mobile:
timeline dọc
Website Copy
Send Records
↓
Preliminary Review
↓
Online Discussion
↓
Travel Planning
↓
Treatment
↓
Follow-Up
Primary Media
Process timeline graphic.
Không dùng ảnh điều trị.
SECTION 5 — COMMUNICATION & COORDINATION
Layout
2-column cards
Bên trái:
Communication
Bên phải:
Travel Support
Website Copy
Good communication is an important part of planning treatment abroad.
Patients may stay connected with the team before, during, and after their visit through:
✓ Email
✓ WhatsApp, Zalo
✓ Phone or Video Consultation
The team may also assist with:
✓ Airport Pickup
✓ Accommodation
✓ Appointment Scheduling
✓ Local Information
Primary Media
Communication Card
Icons:
● Email
● WhatsApp
● Zalo
● Video Consultation
Travel Support Card
Icons:
● Airport Pickup
● Accommodation
● Appointment Scheduling
● Local Information
Supporting Media
Có thể sử dụng:
● screenshots (đã ẩn thông tin)
● consultation call
● coordinator support
SECTION 6 — AFTER YOU RETURN HOME
Layout
4 support cards
Grid
Website Copy
Communication and support may continue after you return home.
This includes:
✓ Recovery Updates
✓ Progress Monitoring
✓ Ongoing Guidance
✓ Answers to Questions During Recovery
Primary Media
Ảnh:
● Online follow-up
● Video consultation
● Bệnh nhân trao đổi với team
Mục tiêu:
Cho thấy sự đồng hành sau điều trị.
SECTION 7 — REAL PATIENT JOURNEYS
Layout
Patient story cards.
Desktop:
3 cards
Mobile:
carousel
Website Copy
Explore real treatment experiences from overseas Vietnamese and international patients at EMIS.
CTA
View Patient Stories
Primary Media
Ưu tiên:
● patient journey stories
● timeline stories
● communication screenshots
● treatment planning examples
Không chỉ dùng before-after.
Recommended Format
Patient photo
↓
Patient story summary
↓
Treatment completed
↓
CTA
SECTION 8 — CTA
Layout
Centered CTA block.
Khoảng trắng rộng.
Background nhẹ.
Website Copy
Planning Treatment In Vietnam?
If you would like to discuss your case or review existing records, the team can help you explore possible next steps.
Primary CTA
Send Your X-ray
Secondary CTA
Discuss Your Situation
Note
Final treatment recommendations require an in-person examination and appropriate diagnostic evaluation.
Primary Media
Không bắt buộc. Có thể sử dụng:
● consultation image
● international patient communication image
